author: mattbirchler
description: Post your notes to your Ghost blog. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ghosty Posty
manifest.description: Post your notes to your Ghost blog.
manifest.name: Ghosty Posty

name: Ghosty Posty

releases.author: mattbirchler
releases.description:
## Ghosty Posty 1.1.1

A small polish release.

### Improvements
- **Tidier publish window** — the **Visibility** dropdown now sits at the bottom of the form, directly above **Send as**, so the audience and delivery options are grouped together.

### Under the hood
- Cleaned up all warnings flagged by Obsidian's plugin review tooling (stricter typing around frontmatter updates and the Ghost API's token signing). No behavior changes.

Requires Obsidian 1.4.10 or newer.

releases.author: mattbirchler
releases.description:
## Ghosty Posty 1.1.0

### New
- **Update existing posts instead of duplicating** — the Ghost post ID is now saved to your note's frontmatter (`ghost_id`), so re-publishing updates the same post rather than creating a new one.
- **Sync from Ghost** — a new command (and right-click item on published notes) that pulls a post's latest content and metadata from your blog back into the note.
- **Overwrite protection** — when updating, Ghosty Posty checks whether the post changed on Ghost since your last sync and warns you before overwriting those edits.
- **Newsletter delivery** — choose how a post goes out: **Post only**, **Email only**, or **Post and email**. Picks up your active newsletters automatically.
- **Visibility** — set a post to **Public**, **Members**, or **Paid members only**.
- **New entry points** — a ribbon icon plus file-explorer and editor right-click menu items, alongside the command palette.

### Improvements
- The command is now correctly named **"Publish to Ghost"** and only appears when a note is open.
- Added a unit test suite covering the Markdown conversion pipeline and frontmatter contract.

Requires Obsidian 1.4.10 or newer.

releases.author: mattbirchler
releases.description: Swaps the markdown converter from the unmaintained showdown library to marked, clearing a security advisory, and tightens type handling of frontmatter. Nested lists in notes now publish with correct nesting, and invalid status values fall back to your default instead of being sent to Ghost.

releases.author: mattbirchler
releases.description: Scheduled posts default to a little later today, not tomorrow.
